name: Silent Magician
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>沈</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイレント・マジシャン
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 Spellcaster monster. Gains 500 ATK for each card in your hand. Once per turn, when a Spell Card is activated (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation. If this card is destroyed by battle, or if this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Silent Magician" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Silent Magician", ignoring its Summoning conditions.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 Spellcaster monster. Gains 500 ATK for each card in your hand. Once per turn, when a Spell Card is activated (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation. If this card is destroyed by battle, or if this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Silent Magician" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Silent Magician", ignoring its Summoning conditions.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 Spellcaster monster. Gains 500 ATK for each card in your hand. sets.set: Duelist Pack: Rivals of the Pharaoh

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Quick, Trigger
action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
